entry.title: Number Ranges for PO number for Sales order number for respective countries

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Change data access language in a story
entry.content: Good to know it's working! All supported paramaters should already be listed in the linked help page above.

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: Use Destinations During Local Development - Cloud Foundry Basics #4
entry.content:
Hi @nicoschoenteich, yeah, you are right. links are working.
If I navigate from github, then getting 403. 
If I copy the link and open it, then no issue.
Thanks for checking.

By the way, could you please answer this query.
If I create a Fiori project using fiori elements, and maintain destination in ui5.yaml, and its working fine. 
If I create a CAP project and added UI as well, and maintain destination in ui5.yaml of app folder, then its not working.
But, in the CAP project, we are able to make the call by maintaining the destination in xs-app.json.

So, maintaining destination in ui5.yaml for a CAP project, wont it work?
Also, if we maintain destination in xs-app.json, then we must deploy to test it. any other way?

entry.title: Need help Updating PDF content through CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am receiving the PDF file in base64 encoded format in CPI and I need to update that through the below API but I am bit confused as how to send the PDF content . Only below information is available in the API specification . Could you please suggest how can I perform PUT operation for updating the PDF content.

I am able to update perfectly from POSTMAN, unable to replicate the same in CPI. Please suggest how can I pass file

entry.title: Integration SAP DRC (cloud edition) with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
We just had a call with SAP regarding the integration of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance  with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management .

During the call, SAP confirmed that it is not possible to connect SAP DRC to both SAP S/4 for outgoing invoices and SAP CIM for incoming invoices.

Desired Scenario: Our goal was to achieve a setup where SAP DRC could handle both outgoing and incoming invoices as described.

 

Why it doesn’t work: SAP DRC only allows one destination to be maintained per participant.So either you root the Invoice to the S/4 directly or to CIM. Once you root the invoice to CIM. You are no longer able to send an invoice from S/4 since the destination for the Participant is set to CIM. 

Users in S/4 need to have access to the CIM App for PDF Invoices and "Manage Electronic Documents"-App for E-Invoices.

Anyone else faced this limitation or found a solution?

 

Best regards

Sergen

entry.title: Re: Execution of OSGi Shell Commands on CPI Runtime Node
entry.content:
https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_fuse/7.11/html-single/apache_karaf_console_reference/index#options
https://karaf.apache.org/manual/latest-3.0.x/#_using_the_console
Which version is in SAP CI?



import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.io.GroovyPrintStream
import org.apache.karaf.shell.api.console.Session
import org.apache.karaf.shell.api.console.SessionFactory
import org.osgi.framework.BundleContext
import org.osgi.framework.FrameworkUtil
import java.lang.StringBuilder
 
Message processData(Message message) {
StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();
    def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
def msg = "";
def cmd = "";
 
cmd = "bundle:list";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:list -s";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
// does not work
// cmd = "bundle:tree-show";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "feature:info system";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "log:display";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
// does not work
// cmd = "service:list";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
 
// displays many events
// cmd = "event:display -v";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
 
// does not work
// cmd = "osgi:list";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
// does not work
// cmd = "osgi:ls";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
// does not work
// cmd = "web:context-list";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
// does not work
// cmd = "web:servlet-list";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
// does not work
// cmd = "cxf:list-busses";
// builder << " " << cmd << " ";
// builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
 
 
msg = builder.toString()
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("osgi.txt", msg, "text/plain");
return message;
 
}
 
def execOsgi(message, cmd){
    
    String command = message.getBody(String.class)
 
    ByteArrayOutputStream out = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
    ByteArrayOutputStream err = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
 
    BundleContext context = FrameworkUtil.getBundle(Message.class).bundleContext
    SessionFactory sessionFactory = (SessionFactory) context.getService(context.getServiceReference(SessionFactory.class))
    Session session = sessionFactory.create(new ByteArrayInputStream(), new GroovyPrintStream(out, true), new GroovyPrintStream(err, true))
    session.execute(cmd)
    def result = out.toString()
    result += err.toString()
    session.close()
 
    return result
 
}

entry.title: Re: Processing of SAP and Document Management System Inte...
entry.content: Hi Omega-ou, I am not sure what you intend to change or what you mean by modify the file storage location? If you check the links above, you can enable the use of 3rd party repository through the communication arrangement. You can also review the Developer Extensibility (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/e1059ff581854a699f15734049f14293.html?locale=en-US) to learn about your options there. You may need to install the developer tools (eclipse) to review the available objects as well.

entry.title: Re: Processing of SAP and Document Management System Inte...
entry.content: You can also review the available onstack objects, etc at the Business Hub https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/onstackextensibility/cdsviews

entry.title: Re: Processing of SAP and Document Management System Inte...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/74fa9fbfe5ad47529fd8373bab397c36.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: RFC/BAPI needed for process order changes
entry.content:
Hi,

which is the right RFC/BAPI to change process order material data (stored in table RESB)?

In particular, we need to change the storage location of components (field RESB-LGORT) as well as the assignment of components to phases (field RESB-VORNR) of process orders

I understand that BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN is not supposed to be used for process orders and CO_SE_PRODORD_CMP_CHANGE also works only for production orders, not process orders.

If CO_SE_PRODORD_CMP_CHANGE is the right one also for process orders, could you please change the RFC to also allow its use for process orders?


Thanks and regards,

Arno

entry.title: Sales rebates - condition contract
entry.content:
Dear experts , 

Our customer requirement for sales rebates is to set in a condition contract for each customer for several material groups . 

For example : 

business volume is calculated by Liter (L) : for Target for Group 1 = 10.000 L  and Target for Group 2 = 20.000 L

Material groupRealised TargetRebate 
Group 1>80% (8.000 L)2.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
>100%(10.000 L)4.5% of sales revenue realised on group 1
Group 2>80% (16.000 L)2.5%of sales revenue realised on group 2
>100% (20.000 L)5% of sales revenue realised on group 2

Could you please tell me what condition contract type to use in order to calculate business volume and how to calculate sales rebate based on sales revenue by material group ?

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Grow with Premium SAP Managed Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We got to know that in GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium licenses, client is entitled for only one Sales cloud V2 tenant and SAP will do end to end integration with SAP S/4 Hana public cloud. 

We have below 2 questions.

1. Will SAP do the integration twice with SAP S/4HANA public cloud, once with quality and once with production system of SAP S/4Hana public cloud with sales cloud v2 single tenant?

2. If SAP do integration only once, then will SAP do the refresh activity once UAT is done in sales cloud V2? 

Please help to understand the process.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Um caso de Sucesso em Transformação com a VLI Logística ....

Jackson Borges, our leader in LAC ISBN posted VLI LOGISTICA journey in Linkedin and it´s really impressive.

Talks about how a Procurement structure coud be optimized with SAP ARIBA products and VLI´s processes.

Click the link below. It is in Portuguese but understandable ... more stories to come.

On this roadmap, SAP mentions Editable Tree Tables will be available on 2502 release:

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cross-product/roadmap-info/ui-services?profile=20034788 

But on this SAP Help link, SAP shows how to implement Editable Tree Tables:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/7cf7a31fd1ee490ab816ecd941bd2f1f

entry.title: HTTPS Message Server Port Enabling for ECC (Multiple Application Instance) System
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having a http to https Conversion Project now.

As a part of it, we need to enable the HTTPS Message Port (Load Balance) for all the SAP ECC Systems. And please note that ECC System is having multiple application instances. 

Kindly help us to guide on how to enable the HTTPS port of Message server host for ECC System.

Also please let us know if any further steps need to perform for this HTTPS conversion.

Thanks,
Basis Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: HTTPS Message Server Port Enabling for ECC (Multiple...
entry.content:
Hello,

The parameter "ms/server_port_X" can be used to define HTTP and HTTPS ports for the Message Server.

For the ICM, the parameter is "icm/server_port_X".

You can configure the desired ports, with the desired protocols.

You must also configure the SSL server certificates using the transaction STRUST ("SSL Server Standard").

If the Message Server is running on the ASCSxx instance, and this instance is not visible in STRUST, you must use the "sapgenpse" tool (directly at operating system level) to create the "SAPSSLS.pse" for the ASCSxx instance.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Change data access language in a story
entry.content: This Javascript solution also worked for me : var appid = Application.getInfo().id; var a = UrlParameter.create("lang","fr"); var fullurl = NavigationUtils.createApplicationUrl(appid,a);

entry.title: Re: Not able to find certification exam for C_THR81_2405
entry.content:
Hi @mgoswami ,

Following URL is opening C_THR81_2405 certification for me:
https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-successfactors-employee-central-core

Please check if you can access it .

About "Buy Learning Hub" message, you need to confirm if you have a valid subscription for the Learning Hub and also for the Certification Hub. You can check this by logging in training.sap.com and then access the following link: https://training.sap.com/my-training/training/

In the above link you'll have access to "My Training" area, with your subscription history.   In case you don't have active Learning Hub/Certification Hub Subscriptions, then you'll have to buy and activate it again.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Parametrization Variables in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an example that includes the forecast of students enrolled in courses, such as bachelor's, master's, and postgraduate programs. Each level has a price, for instance, bachelor's €300, master's €1,000, and postgraduate €800. What I want is to make these prices configurable parameters, meaning I want to create two tables: one with the necessary information and another table containing these variables. This way, when the user wants to change the prices of higher education levels, the calculations will be updated automatically.

thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Re: Consume Custom Entity in another CDS view
entry.content: you do the association as usual, you just cannot pick a field from the custom entity

entry.title: Re: Blank page when logging in SAC inside Excel Desktop
entry.content: I read the documentation, but it didn’t solve the issue; the blank page problem persists. Do you have any other suggestions?

entry.title: Re: Parametrization Variables in SAC
entry.content:
Hi 

To achieve this, create two tables:

1.student Forecast Table: This table should include the information about enrolled students, specifying the course type (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Postgraduate) and the number of enrollments for each type.

2. Price Configuration Table: This table should store the prices for each course type with two columns: Course_Type (Bachelor's, Master's, Postgraduate) and `Price`.

When calculations are needed, use a join between the student Forecast Table and the Price Configuration Table based on the Course_Type. This will allow you to dynamically adjust pricing by updating values in the Price Configuration Table without modifying the logic.

entry.title: Re: How to monitor emails that is been sent from CAPM app...
entry.content:
Hi 

To monitor email status in SAP BTP using your CAP application:

1. Use the SAP BTP Cockpit for monitoring under Service Monitoring or Application Logs.
2. Enable logging in your CAP application to track email transactions using libraries like `@sap/logging`.
3. Check Log Management in SAP BTP Cockpit for email-related entries.
4. Ensure the Email Service in Cloud Foundry is configured correctly, and review service-specific logs.
5. Verify that your email destination configuration in Destinations is accurate.
6. Refer to the [SAP Help Guide](https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/monitor-email-transmissions) for specific monitoring steps and tools.

entry.title: How to correct Data in ODQMON
entry.content:
Hi All,

Anyway we can modify/correct the issue records/rows at ODQMON ?

We could see some wrong data ( ex: Wrong Date - Ex:24/20/2024  ) displayed on one column at ODQMON level.

When it gets loaded to BW via Delta DTP , its gets failed with invalid date error.

How can we correct this record & make the BW delta load success ? As there is no option to correct data records at ODQMON.

we tried below options to skip that issue records but not worked.

- DTP exclusion of Issue Document number 

- ERR DTP

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Press Enter Before saving anything in ALV Output Edit...
entry.content: or directly to the method CHECK_CHANGED_DATA.

entry.title: Re: Parametrization Variables in SAC
entry.content:
hi, thanks for the answer, how do i create a join for these. I want something like this:

How do i create a join in the story, i am using optimized story. i don´t have the price in the model. What can i do to solve this issue.

entry.title: CATS on GDPR
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

we have an issue from the Data Protection Team regarding CATS_APPR_LITE and CATS_DA t-codes. As per their statement - if number of hours charged by users are shown to everyone then it is against GDPR. Can you please help us understand if this is really GDPR non-compliance?

Data protection team said the Line Manager can only read and approve the time for their subordinate and the Cost Object Owner can only read and approve the time which booked to their cost object.

This is not happening unless we need to program the logic in CATS. I wonder this kind of requirement why has not been a standard SAP functionality?

Thank you!
Alex 
P.S: Posted on behalf of my customer. We appreciate your support!

entry.title: Reverse PL30 with document type 3Z in Total Divestiture in Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hello GR community,

I have a question regarding with the divestiture of a investee unit. When a CU leaves, we indicate the period of divestiture in the group structure and the activity 11 "Total divestiture" for the Activity based COI elimination. Then, task 2060 "Preparation for Consolidation Group Changes" reverses the postings made until PL 20 using document types 0Z, 1Z and 2Z, but not documents posted in PL30. 

How can we reverse these posting? Should we use the task S2180 Total divestiture? If so, which requirements do we need to take into account to enable the task to do the pertinent automatic postings to generate 3Z documents?

Thank you in advance! BR

entry.title: Re: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content:
Hi,

In our next major release 2502, there will be a new app called "HANA Memory Analysis", which gives an overview of the memory consumption of the HANA memory components over time.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Our S/4 HANA DB Size
entry.content:
Hi,

In our next major release 2502, there will be a new app called "HANA Memory Analysis", which gives an overview of the memory consumption of the HANA memory components over time.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Functional differences between SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP S/4HANA On-premise
entry.content:
Hi Jose,

going forward, will there be new functionalities ONLY available in Cloud private edition and NOT in the on-prem version (especially related to AI), or can we assume all future innovation will also be covered by the code-base of S/4 HANA OP?

Thanks,

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Asset Disposal Migration in S...
entry.content: Dear Arturo

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Asset Disposal Migration in S...
entry.content: ear Arturo, I wanted to inform you that we are in the process of migrating assets in the middle of this year. As part of this process, assets that are scheduled for disposal in the current year need to be migrated accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Procedure sa_get_request_times is ignoring hostvars
entry.content: Hi Chris. Still waiting for the fix. Should I open an incident at SAP Support Portal?

entry.title: Re: Chart of Accounts: Changing Length of G/L Account Number
entry.content:
Hi @kaiwenguo ,

There's no major impact. I've done this in the past and quite sucessfully.

Two important notes:

  1. Search help: where in the past you could use '63*' to search for all accounts starting by 63, after the customizing change you will need to input '00063*';
  2. Developments: you really need to test all your developments, because, if for some bad decision in the past, it was not used the standard type for GL account, you might have problems.

 

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: ODATA loading only column headers no data
entry.content:
When using copy link for ODATA services I get the link below:

https://businessobjects4/biprws/raylight/v1/documents/cuid_AVBh0PdouLNDu1jJ7iJnMmo/datamodel/data.svc/re_3409586-3409591

When adding the above to excel get the column headers but no data from the report is loaded.  When using a sample Webi report it works fine.

Using Excel for MS 365

entry.content:
Hi all,

I installed the eclipse IDE and added the ABAP perspective to it.

But when i am going to create the project , i am getting like this.

when i click OK.

i am getting this. can you please help me in this.

I installed and followed the process as suggested by some You Tube video.

If i missed to install any other files or if i installed wrong version of the IDE or any other step need to follow, Please guide me in this, If possible provide the link for the files need to download. thank you for your time and support.

entry.title: S4 Hana PUBLIC Cloud and DRC Cloud - Supplier e-invoicing legislation starting Jan 2025
entry.content:
Hello All! My organization has S4 Public CLoud and DRC Cloud installed in DEV system in preparation for Germany e-Invoicing for supplier invoices. There is a requirement to be ready to accept supplier e-invoices in Jan 2025.

However, we only have suppliers with PDF and XML attachments and none of them are connected to the PEPPOL network. I would like to understand how my organisation can test the PEPPOL to DRC connectivity with without the suppliers assistance?

I see the blog also (New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What ... - SAP Community ) which talks about a new feature to allow us to manually upload into e-cockpit within DRC, but this is planned for sometime in December 2024.  SAP link provides more information   Regulatory Change Manager

I have reviewed this blog which talks about setting yourself up as sender and receiver but seems to be S4 Hana on prem and ECC.  End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Do... - SAP Community

Not getting a huge amount of help from SAP either from support or from some DRC team members I am in contact with.

'email to DRC upload' functionality appears to be coming, but only planned for 13th december, doesnt give a lot of time to review before Jan 2025...  https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/new-b2b-electronic-invoicing-law-in-germany-what-you-need-to-know/ba-p/13895483

Any help.ideas, great fully received

entry.title: Re: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Thanks Monika, looked at the testing help which refers you to a blog for S4 on prem and ECC i think.  It suggests I think to set yourself up as a sender to send a customer invoice?

The new functionality sounds interesting from email to DRC, but is only planned for 13th December, which gives us two weeks to review and be ready for the legislation

We are not connected to the Ariba network.  So we have to test I think via PEPPOL network for the supplier invoice and we can also look at the email option if/when it arrives on the 13th december

entry.title: SAP EMS objects
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can you please provide your views on the below?

Does SAP entitlements created in EMS system need to be existed as a separate object in upstream systems as well?

For example, if warranty is an entitlment , then a service contract is necessarily to be created in S/4HANA also? or say a software entitlement require a order/contract for software services need to be created in S4HANA as well alongwith license as a entitlement created out of entitlememt model in EMS?

 

Thanks

Sam

entry.title: Re: QR Code button
entry.content: The Learner View is a built-in display feature of the SEN Manager server aimed at Learners, versus Reporters or Administrators. Although some Learner View features within SEN Manager can be shown or hidden via the  Administration > Server Settings, such as the Global Search checkbox or the Search field, the QR code button does not have such a Show/Hide setting. Some of my customers like the QR code option to allow Learners to share content with each other, but the customers who do not use QR codes simply ignore this feature.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite and IOT - protocol MQTT
entry.content: there is also an SAP offering for MQTT, see https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite/advanced-event-mesh.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @Maheshwar_Singh,

Thank you for the detailed blog. I have followed your steps closely, but I'm unable to access the "Clone Connections" page after the Sign In step. The screen remains stuck on loading with a prompt saying, "Please finish selecting connections from your external tenant." I've also consulted additional community blogs and KBAs for setting up the common Identity Authentication Service between SAP SuccessFactors and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Community Blog:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-saml-sso-with-btp-cloud-identity-services-identity/ba-p/13500244

KBA:
https://help.sap.com/docs/CX_NG_SALES/ea5ff8b9460a43cb8765a3c07d3421fe/eceac5a75db64ddbb7afd524058a0a0c.html

Could you please assist with this?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Budget Transfer Timing for STO Transactions
entry.content: You can control the value flow of when the inventory costs are transferred in the Schedule Line Category in the Delivery configuration.  This configuration determines when the value of the inventory changes hands.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors

The screen remains stuck on loading with a prompt saying, "Please finish selecting connections from your external tenant." I've also consulted additional community blogs and KBAs for setting up the common Identity Authentication Service between SAP SuccessFactors and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Community Blog:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-saml-sso-with-btp-cloud-identity-services-identity/ba-p/13500244

Could you please assist with this?

Thanks.

entry.title: WM Bin sort
entry.content:
Hi,

Want to check if there is any way to sort bin numbers created at stack level when warehouse creates in a different bin order.

Currently our bin order shows as below:

1N-00-A0
1N-00-C0
1N-00-E0
1N-08-A0
1N-08-E0
1N-08-J0
1N-08-O0
1N-100-A0
1N-100-E0
1N-14-A0
1N-14-E0

Warehouse wants to sort the above bins by stack number (Rowrow-stackstackstack-levellevel) which would be as below order:

1N-00-A0
1N-00-C0
1N-00-E0
1N-08-A0
1N-08-E0
1N-08-J0
1N-08-O0
1N-14-A0
1N-14-E0
1N-100-A0
1N-100-E0

Can the above order be achieved in LS11?

I understand it is sorting taking the whole bin field as alphanumeric characters but just wanted to confirm if there any option to get it sorted with stack 100 at the end?

TIA

entry.title: SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg focused on using AI to make apps easier to build and use
entry.content:
SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg was a great success. It was our third and final event in 2024, held on November 19 in our AppHaus in Heidelberg. The goal was to empower developers, architects, and technical consultants with knowledge on how to build SAP Fiori apps for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and all the new AI functionality that we are building into the SAP Fiori elements framework.

 

We started by asking the attendees to define SAP Fiori. Here’s what they came up with:

 

Our customers seem to be aligned with us on what SAP Fiori means.

[ALT TEXT: A word cloud created by the attendees with the prompt “what is SAP Fiori?” The biggest words in the cloud are innovation, UX, user experience, design, and modern.]

 

It was very gratifying to see the results, as the participants have the same view of SAP Fiori that SAP does – a design system for creating modern and innovative user experiences.

 

We then launched into the day, showing examples of the SAP Fiori user experience across SAP S/4HANA, including many of the innovations that we have recently added to our public cloud version. The day proceeded as follows:

 

[ALT TEXT: graphic of the schedule for SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Heidelberg]

 

SAP Fiori is the face of SAP S/4HANA Cloud

The starting point for SAP S/4HANA Cloud is My Home. It provides an easy way to find and launch all your SAP Fiori apps. Most of those apps will be based on SAP Fiori elements. My Home includes a new “recommended” tab that uses AI to recommend apps to a user based on their role in the system. This makes it faster and easier for someone to get started with SAP S/4HANA.

 

[ALT TEXT: screen shot of My Home for SAP S/4HANA with the different tabs for apps displayed.]

 

From My Home, people launch the apps they need to complete their work. We use SAP Fiori elements to build around 80% of new apps for SAP S/4HANA Cloud. It saves developers time on creating the user interface, drives consistency across apps, and ensures that all the enterprise functionality that people expect (accessibility, internationalization, responsiveness, security, etc.) are built into the applications.

 

[ALT TEXT: Two SAP Fiori elements apps in SAP S/4HANA, one showing a list report and the other an object page.]

 

AI powers application generation

Since the event was focused on developers, we spent lots of time showing our latest AI-driven tools for creating applications. In SAP Fiori tools 2403, we introduced the ability to generate applications from a business requirements document. At innovation day, we showed a lab preview of an application generator that uses an image of the app as the starting point. This was the foundation of the hands-on session where participants could sketch an image on paper or the white board and generate an SAP Fiori elements application from that. The AI creates the CAP service, the application, and even sample data so you can test your app. We plan to release this soon. The hands-on allowed participants to try SAP Fiori elements, the flexible programming model, SAP Fiori tools, and the planned AI capabilities in the context of creating a contract management application.

 

SAP Fiori is incorporating more AI for business users

We ended the day with some previews of planned AI functionality that will first be released into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editon.

  • Easy filter – natural language searching in SAP Fiori elements list reports
  • Smart summarization – AI-created summary of SAP Fiori elements object pages
  • Assisted error resolution – providing more context on system errors with recommendations to resolve them
  • Recap – a summary of what you missed when you were away from your SAP system
  • Joule-assisted insight card creation in My Home– ask Joule for the information you need and create a card that you can add to My Home

Some of these are currently in beta testing with selected public cloud customers.

 

It takes great teamwork to put on SAP Fiori Innovation Day

Putting on an event like this is a major undertaking with many contributors. Thank you to all the SAP presenters (in order of appearance): Katja Zoch, Sebastian Steinhauer, Thomas Reiss, Ioannis Grammatikakis, Carine Tchoutouo Djomo, Thorsten Lange, Ian Quigley; hands-on facilitators: Katrin Polloczek and Christoph Gollmick; partner presenters (also in order of appearance): Michael Englbrecht from eXXcellent solutions, Christophe Chan Hin from sovanta with Sören Schulz from Die Continetale, and Dr. Felix Aller & Christoph Ueberle from cbs Corporate Business Solutions; and panelists: Tina Butz from cbs, Christian Heinrich from sovanta, Michael Englbrecht from eXXcellent solutions, Ioannis Grammatikakis, head of UX Engineering at SAP.

 

There were also many SAP colleagues who worked behind the scenes to create all the demos and hands-on exercises. And, of course, the AppHaus team, led by Beate Riefer, who handled all the on-site logistics. Finally, a huge thanks to Sebastian Werner, who worked closely with me to bring this event to life.

 

Most of all, thank you to all the customers that attended, asked insightful questions, and engaged with us all and all the partners during the breaks and after hours.  

 

 

 

Next steps

  • Join us at an SAP Fiori Development Innovation Day in 2025 – vote on the locations where we should host the events
  • Register for the monthly SAP Fiori development roundtable call to meet other developers and architects who build SAP Fiori apps.
  • Subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter, in which we share updates on SAP Fiori elements, SAP Fiori tools, SAPUI5, and SAP Build Code every other month.  
  • Read about the other SAP Fiori Innovation Days we hosted in Dublin and Chicago.

entry.title: Need help with to create Cross-Tab format report
entry.content: I want to implement the cross-tab crystal report in this format. Please advise how I can do that. I added rows and columns correctly, but the amount is not displaying correctly in the summarized field(total_payment_amount) from SQL results. I tried using the min function, and it showed that some amounts were correct, but not all were correct.  How should I display the proper amount? See the attached files for sql and the format. Thanks

entry.title: How to set default document type of PR which is created via MRP?
entry.content:
Now PR type created via MRP is only "NB", but I need to change to another type. Let me know how to do it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set default document type of PR which is creat...
entry.content:
Hi,

By default, SAP uses NB. If you want to alter this, the MRP groups will be your go-to.

The customizing process is carried out in Activity/SSCUI 'Define MRP Groups'.

After you've input the MRP group into your material master MRP view, the subsequent MRP run will generate requisitions using the document types that are maintained in the MRP group.

I hope this clarifies your query.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Plug and Gain Essentials and Key Resources
entry.content:
The plug and gain approach from SAP Signavio lets you combine the fast data insights from SAP Signavio Process Insights and combines these with the flexibility offered by the features of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence. Plug and gain provides you with a predefined starting point for transformation and continuous improvement projects based on data from SAP ERP Central Component (SAP ECC), SAP S/4HANA, or SAP Ariba.

This blog summarizes the essentials and key resources about the plug and gain approach.

Essentials: Process Landscape Analysis and Accelerators for dedicated processes

1. Process Landscape Analysis (aka Process House)

What is available?
70+ Process Process Flow variants organized along SAP Business Reference Architecture. 

Purpose of the accelerator?
Understand the current process executions and performance across all E2E-processes. Identify areas with improvement potential, in particular transformation related.

Which analysis is provided?
Standardized analysis across all Process Flow variants covering:

  • Process execution analysis (how and how effective is the process currently executed)
  • Process variant analysis (how does the process execution relate to business performance and what are the process variants to be retained in the transformation)
  • Transaction code analysis (what are the transaction codes used in process execution)

How to get the accelerator deployed?
Process Landscape Analysis can only be deployed by SAP. Customers need to create a support case in SAP for ME. The procedure is explained in SAP Help, and request form details are in SAP Note 3529579


2. Accelerators for dedicated processes (aka Extension Packages)

What is available?

  • Finance – invoice to cash
  • Finance – invoice to pay
  • Finance – record to report (reduce days to close books)
  • Lead to cash
  • Source to pay
  • Source to pay (ERP/Ariba)
  • Plan to fulfill
  • Acquire to decommission

Purpose of the accelerator?
In-depth analysis of a dedicated process in questions related to transformation and continuous improvement.

Which analysis is provided?
a) Process-specific analysis for transformation:

  • Process effectiveness over time
  • How to improve process effectiveness
  • Improve master data quality

b) Process-specific analysis for continuous improvement:

  • 2-4 domain specific continuous improvement dashboards
  • Examples: “Improve your payment term usage” (invoice to cash), “Improve your three-way match rate” (source to pay), “Avoid process delays” (lead to cash), “Optimize your closing process” (record to report)

How to get the accelerator deployed?
Accelerators can be deployed by customers themselves or by SAP. If customers want SAP to deploy the accelerator, they need to create a support case in SAP for ME. The procedure is explained in in SAP Help, and request form details are in SAP Note 3529579

Key Resources

Name

Type

For whom?

General Guide: Getting started with the SAP Signavio Plug and Gain approach

SAP Community Blog

Overview for all audiences

Technical Guide: Getting started with the SAP Signavio Plug and Gain approach

SAP Community Blog

Administrator

Getting Started Guide for Process Landscape Analysis with Plug and Gain

Presentation

Process Expert

SAP Signavio Plug and Gain Approach video series

Video Series

Overview for all audiences

Plug and Gain Onboarding

SAP Help

Administrator, Process Expert

entry.title: Re: HOW TO - Read & Write the MDG key mapping informations programmatically (aka UKMS)
entry.content:
Adding the code snippet here, in case someone is unable to refer to the picture.

DATA: ls_key_mapping TYPE ukm_s_mapping_easy,
      lt_key_mapping TYPE ukm_t_mappings_easy,
      ls_messages    TYPE ukm_s_messages,
      ls_message     TYPE ukm_s_message.
CALL METHOD cl_ukm_factory=>get_instance_easy
  EXPORTING
    iv_displaced_version         = ''
    iv_runtime_generated_context = ''
  IMPORTING
    er_if_ukm_easy               = DATA(lr_if_ukm)
*   es_message                   =
*            CHANGING
*   cv_buffer_lines_max          =
  .
IF lr_if_ukm IS BOUND.
  ls_key_mapping-main_context_id = 'BusinessPartner'.
  ls_key_mapping-source-client_default = 'X'.
  ls_key_mapping-source-scheme_id = '888'.
  ls_key_mapping-source-scheme_agency_id = 'BUS_SYS_ID'. "Source business system ID
  ls_key_mapping-source-value = '1000008'.
  APPEND ls_key_mapping TO lt_key_mapping.

  CALL METHOD lr_if_ukm->get
    EXPORTING
      iv_read_buffer   = abap_false        " UKM: Read access to the bufer
      iv_update_buffer = abap_false        " UKM: Write access to the buffer
    IMPORTING
      es_messages      = ls_messages                " UKM: Status information and messages for the user
    CHANGING
      ct_key_mapping   = lt_key_mapping.                 " UKM: Mappings

  CLEAR: lt_key_mapping, ls_messages.

  ls_key_mapping-target-client_default = 'X'.
  ls_key_mapping-target-scheme_id = '888'.
  ls_key_mapping-target-scheme_version_id = ''.
  ls_key_mapping-target-scheme_agency_id = 'TARG_BUSYS'. "Target business System ID
  ls_key_mapping-target-scheme_agency_scheme_id = ''.
  ls_key_mapping-target-value = '2000008'.
  APPEND ls_key_mapping TO lt_key_mapping.

  CALL METHOD lr_if_ukm->add
    EXPORTING
      it_key_mapping = lt_key_mapping                 " UKM: Mappings
    IMPORTING
      es_messages    = ls_messages.                 " BAPIRET2 messages
  CALL METHOD lr_if_ukm->save
    EXPORTING
      iv_save_in_update_task = abap_false        " UKM: Boolean flags for the interface behavior
      iv_cleanup_buffer      = abap_true        " UKM: Boolean flags for the interface behavior
*     iv_no_exclusive_locks  = abap_false       " UKM: Do not set any exclusive locks (only short keys)
    IMPORTING
      es_message             = ls_message.                  " UKM: Status information and messages for the user

ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: DAC not working in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Try to recheck the mapping, or post it as a screen shot. Also try to check the values. Maybe there is a space? Makes no really sense that it works for the column but not for the one value

entry.title: I am trying to change the category name of a group of goals to an a different category name.
entry.content:
I have a group of goals in current goal plan with the Category Name "Budget" and I am trying to import  these goals with a new category name.  The new category exists in our template.  My  job is running successfully, but the category name is not changing on the goal plans.  I downloaded my goal IDs via Table Reports and pasted the IDs into the template. I have tried small batches (les than 10 updates) and large batches (Over 10,000 updates.)  All of these goals were added via the UI, so there is not GUID.

My import file contains values in the import template for columns Type, Action, ID, Objective_Categery

^TYPEACTIONIDOBJECTIVE_CATEGORY
OBJECTIVEUPDATE1106997Drive Operational Excellence (Safe & Reliable Operations, Resilience, Financial & Environmental Targets)

entry.title: TM Document Types in S4 Hana Public Cloud..
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

I am exploring Transportation management with SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud. The specific scenario I am configuring is External planning (Scope Item -6W1) with S4 TM as external planning system. There are standard Freight Unit type (SFU1) and Freight order type (SFO1) given in the Public cloud system. 
I was wondering if I can configure my own Freight Unit types and freight order types in Public Cloud. I tried the Central Business configuration but could not find a place where I can configure the same.

Please let me know if somebody has configure these documents types in Public Cloud and if there is a particular role needed to have these configured.

Thank you,
Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Asset inventory list in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi Jan,

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas - Admin question or rather your best pra...
entry.content:
In our system we have DEV 300 and 400.  DEV 400 is where we do our development for Personas flavors.  When done, I push to client 300.  Client 300 is where the customizing transports are created and eventually moved to QA and PRD.  We don't refresh our client 300 so our flavors are always available there.  If this scenario doesn't work for you then you could export flavors out of QA or PRD and import into DEV as required.

Thanks,

Brian

entry.title: Re: Asset inventory list in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Jan,

It's a very late, but this might help other users.

To generate a list of Assets with the inventory flag set, in the "Manage Fixed Assets" app it is possible to add the field  "Inventory Number" to the filter to create a list of assets. 

In the "Asset Balances" app it is possible to use the field “Include Asset” field to create a list of assets. 

Check this KBA note : 3415226 - Inventory Report for Asset Accounting - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Kind regards.

Oussama MEHENNI

SAP S/4 Hana Financial Consultant

entry.title: Re: How to remove the data limit from a generic drill down app ?
entry.content:
Hi Mathieu,

I also have same kind of requirement. Were you able to find the solution for this ?.

If so could you please share here

entry.title: Re: Companion content not visible in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Joke,

It's possible that an upgrade to the UI of SF has resulted in the issue.  For example, about two years ago the SF Home screen was updated and at that time they added a different context value to the screen so that some customers could continue to run the old screen and some switch to the new screen.  Try this:

1. Open SF
2. Click the SAP Companion editing pencil to go into edit mode
3. Click the gear icon and choose Show Context Information
4. Check the Screen ID value, Product Name, and Version value listed on the dialog box that appears.  Compare the values in the Requested column with your content, do they align?

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Hit error when applying patch 19.24.0.0.240716 - 2024...
entry.content:
HI Janos,

Thanks for your advice, catsbp execution was incomplete. I fixed errors shown in log file, catsbp as complete and parameter changed successfully.

Cheers,

Helen

entry.title: Re: Need another field in "Manage Customer Line Items" or "Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
How to Display BSEG-ANBNF in Fiori App?

First of all, thank you very much for the post.
I’m currently facing an issue where I need to display the value of the BSEG-ANBNF field (Number of the bill of exchange request) in a Fiori app. However, this field is neither mapped in the CDS view (I_ARLINEITEM) nor exposed through the OData service (FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS). I could only find the field referring to BSEG-DISBN (Bill of exchange usage document).

In this case, what would be the best approach to achieve this?

Best regards,
Mylena

entry.title: No se ejecuta el cliente web sap 10 si cierro la sesión de el suse
entry.content:
Buen día expertos,

tengo el siguiente inconveniente,

Quiero ingresar al cliente web pero la pagina no carga, al ingresar al suse y a la ruta /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/WebClient y correr "statup.sh start", se puede ingresar al cliente web, mientras la sesión de el suse esta activa, al cerrarla deja de abrirse el cliente web

entry.title: Re: Scheduling agreement flexible workflow on approval ,T...
entry.content: We fixed this by adding RLWRT in user exit EXIT_SAPMM06E_012 export structure EKKO_CI directly. So that you can modify in user exit and after user exit call, move corresponding will push it to EKKO.  Note, This does not add field in EKKO table DB . So far, its working fine. I suggest raise OSS message and post here if you get better solution. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas - Admin question or rather your best pra...
entry.content: ^^ this

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in People Story reports
entry.content:
Hi @Aneta_Krysiak 

My guess is that the currency rate you see is the inverse of the rate in the table. I'm not sure when the rates were loaded but based on the conversion rate today, it looks pretty close for the EUR GBP pairing. Currency rates only need to be provided in one direction in the table but both directions can be calculated.

Hope this helps.

Christian

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in People Story reports
entry.content: Hi @Aneta_Krysiak My guess is that the currency rate you see is the inverse of the rate in the table. I'm not sure when the rates were loaded but based on the conversion rate today, it looks pretty close for the EUR GBP pairing. Currency rates only need to be provided in one direction in the table but both directions can be calculated. Hope this helps. Christian

entry.title: Re: (:25x: Account Identification) is missing in uploadin...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you actually have the error message right in front of you. You simply need to understand what it means. It is related to your bank statement file, not any configuration in your master data.

 

Your file seems to lack the :25: tag, so go ahead and double check if you can find that.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Terminate employee with no access to SSFF
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Terminated employees cannot access the system, user accounts are deactivated when people are terminated.

If this information helped you, please, Accept as Solution.

Cristian Ocampo

entry.title: Re: CAMT.053 File Mapping for accounting posting
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you do not need to develop anything. You can use the mapping engine which SAP provides.

You find more information in the help portal: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/3cb1182b4a184bdd93f8d62e3f1f0741/5481c611480e4c23bf49e3af651d8e4d.html

 

It's available on private cloud (OP) and public cloud.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: ME23N CREATE ATTACHMENT
entry.content: You can create an implicit enhancement as shown below to enable it.

entry.title: Re: ASKB – Periodic Asset Posting – Posting Date before Data Transfer from oldsystem.
entry.content: Did you managed to get an answer for this?

entry.title: 3 way match configuration settings
entry.content: What steps/test procedures should be followed to verify whether 3 way match configuration settings have been configured appropriately?

entry.title: Re: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Zoetermeer, NL)
entry.content: In the section „will you attend“ hit the yes button, that’s it. The site usually is not clear on who made the cut in terms of maximum number of participants… from other events you will get confirmation email a week before or so.

entry.title: Batch jobs information required
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We need SAP recommendation for below programs, can you please tell what is the use of below standard program and if we need to setup batch jobs for this program. If yes, what is the frequency.  

  1. UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX
  2.  /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE - Component CA-UI5-ABA-AIDX

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Batch jobs information required
entry.content:
For information on these reports, please see the following KBAs:

2474334 - When to use /UI5/UPDATE_CACHEBUSTER or /UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE https://me.sap.com/notes/2474334

3095424 - How to execute report /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE https://me.sap.com/notes/3095424

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Approval Workflows - Report on approval timestamp
entry.content:
Hi @GiovanniBianchino,

Advanced Reporting does not support timestamp / Date-time datatype as default fields in the query. As a workaround, you can create a calculated column, use the desired date as the source and define a custom format (yyyy-dd-MM hh:mm:ss.

Please check this KBA 2587890 - Advanced Reporting displays only the date for timestamp fields (Canvas / ORD Report) - SAP for Me for additional details.

If this information helped you, please, Accept as Solution.

Cristian Ocampo

entry.title: Re: AIF messages stuck in status 'In processing' though t...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if the action FM is marked as success by setting flag.

Check if there are any dumps when the output is processed.

Share more information on what your action FM does to analyze further.

Also you can refer to my latest blog on AIF structure persistence.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/use-case-to-demonstrate-aif-structure-persistence-within-sap-s-4/ba-p/13939753

entry.title: Adding SF Analytics subsystem to IAS - both for SSO and for provisioning
entry.content:
For our SuccessFactors UAT system, the application for SF Analytics was not added automatically in IAS whereas this happened for our dev and test instances. How can we add the application manually both for SSO and for provisioning? Where can we find the required information?

We can't directly access the analytics system to get the SAML certificate required.

entry.title: Re: Adding SF Analytics subsystem to IAS - both for SSO a...
entry.content:
And of course, right as I posted this, I came across this note: 2945740 - People Analytics Upgrade fails with error pointing that IAS is not configured on your instance ( Checklist to confirm if IAS is correctly enabled) - SAP for Me

So for now, that's the path I'll take. Sorry for the noise

entry.title: Some routing values not refecting in quantity structure
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I noticed after running ck40n, some of the values in my routing reflected in the cost estimate with quantity structure, and some also did not.

For example, a work center with two activity types (machine setup and labor) will only see the values of labor reflecting cost estimate with quantity structure.

I am new to CO. Your assistance on this is greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Content Enricher with Combine and Enrich Aggregation Algorithms in SAP CPI
entry.content: what is content enricher

entry.title: How can I use variable value in inner join in SQLScript
entry.content:
Hello,

Please direct me to use the value in the mat_table in the inner join in a different SQL.

The mat_table has the value /1MD/MD______038. I want to use the table name in the second query. Currently, I've hard coded. I like to replace with dynamic value.

Thank you,

William

mat_table =

  1.       select physical_name

        from

        (

            select   physical_name,

            ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY physical_name

                       ORDER BY version desc) RANK_COLUMN

            from mdg_gn_tgobj

            where logical_name = 'TCK_MM_MATERIAL' order by version desc

        ) where rank_column = 1;

2nd query as under

tusmd1213 =

        select

            usmd120c.usmd_crequest as usmd_crequest,

            usmd_seqnr,

            "/1MD/MMMATERIAL" as matnr,

            right(usmd_value,13) as usmd_value,

            right(usmd_value,1) as right_val,

            CASE

                when right(usmd_value,1) = '-'

                        then CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,13))

                ELSE         CONCAT(CONCAT( 'MM   USMDKMMMATERIAL               ',usmd120c.usmd_crequest),right(usmd_value,12))

            END as objectid

 

        FROM usmd120c

 

--     Select material Only

        inner join usmd1213

        on    usmd1213.usmd_crequest = usmd120c.usmd_crequest

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity      = 'MATERIAL'

        and   usmd1213.usmd_entity_obj  = 'MATERIAL'

 

--      Link WITH usmd110c to determine MM only

        inner join Usmd110C

        ON    usmd120c.usmd_creq_type = Usmd110C.usmd_creq_type

        AND   usmd110c.usmd_model   = 'MM'

        and   usmd110c.mandt        = :p_clnt

 

--      Get the material from the table

       inner join "/1MD/MD______038" as _md038   ( Need to change with dynamic value instead of hardcoded )

   

        on _md038.USMDKMMMATERIAL = right(usmd_value,13)

      where     usmd120c.usmd_crequest in (   '000000084178')

;

entry.title: SAP CI iFlow exception as noted in SAP Note 3293244 but still processed Post Processing
entry.content: We have a production iFlow used for SFTP -> SFTP integration that experienced the "'Cannot store file' and 'cause: 4:" condition as outlined in SAP Note 3293244. We do understand what the cause of the exception was caused by and have resolved the condition. However, we discovered that the SFTP Sender adapter of the flow still triggered it's Post Processing action even though the SFTP Receiver adapter had failed with this exception. In our case it was a Delete File post processing step and we ended up loosing the file as we do not store those payloads. I'm interested to know if this is standard behavior where exceptions can occur in the iFlow and yet still allow the Post Processing to resolve? In our case it was a 'Stale File Handle' error.
